2026-0513
2026-05-28PSPCNational Capital ActOrder Approving that the NCC Extend the Lease with Conseil scolaire de district catholique du centre-est de l’Ontario Order approving that the National Capital Commission grant one option to extend the ground lease with Conseil scolaire de district catholique du centre-est de l’Ontario, for a period of five years, beginning on April 1, 2028, to occupy the real property located at 3781 Sixth Street, in Ottawa, Ontario.N/A
subject: Order Approving that the NCC Extend the Lease with Conseil scolaire de district catholique du centre-est de l’Ontario
precis: Order approving that the National Capital Commission grant one option to extend the ground lease with Conseil scolaire de district catholique du centre-est de l’Ontario, for a period of five years, beginning on April 1, 2028, to occupy the real property located at 3781 Sixth Street, in Ottawa, Ontario.
